context: A little boy enjoys a warm summer day by playing in a shallow kiddie pool in the backyard.

actions.description: Boy crouches in the blue pool and dips the yellow bucket into the cool water.
He lifts the bucket and splashes water outward, laughing as droplets scatter across the pool rim.
He scoops again while flowers and fence stay steady in the sunlit background.
